technical_rank: A for reviewed provincial and Standardbred systems; country coverage incomplete
systems: Ontario Racing Thoroughbred, Standardbred, and Quarter Horse
Provincial racing authorities requiring separate review
decision: Reviewed Ontario and Standardbred routes provide official or industry-authoritative race dates and detailed schedules, but Canadian racing is provincial and multi-code. Complete country-wide source coverage is not established, so the country page remains capped at C.
